title: How Do I Turn Off Email Alerts on BuyAndScrap.com?
metaDescription: Easily stop email alerts from BuyAndScrap.com. This quick guide shows you how to turn off email notifications, manage preferences, or unsubscribe from updates. Take control.
targetKeyword: how do i turn off email alerts
content:
To effectively manage or turn off email alerts from BuyAndScrap.com, simply log in to your account, navigate to 'My Account' or 'Settings', find 'Email Preferences' or 'Notifications', and adjust your choices. Remembering to save your changes is crucial to stop unwanted emails and manage **how do I turn off email alerts** on our platform. Whether you're browsing for your next honest car or ready to [sell your car](/sell), we make managing notifications straightforward.

### Why You Receive Our Email Alerts

We send email alerts to keep you updated. You might get them for [Saved Searches](/guides/how-to-save-a-search) you've created, like "Ford Fiesta under £3,000". We also alert you to price drops on cars you've favourited. General news or useful tips, such as our [Free MOT Checker](/mot-checker), also go out. While we aim to inform, we understand you might need a break.

## Your Guide: How Do I Turn Off Email Alerts on BuyAndScrap.com?

Follow these simple steps to take control of your inbox.

### Step 1: Log In to Your Account

First, head to BuyAndScrap.com. Log in using your registered email and password. If you've forgotten your details, use the 'forgot password' link to quickly regain access.

### Step 2: Find Your Notification Settings

Once logged in, look for your account dashboard or profile section. Click 'My Account' or your name, usually found at the top right of the page. Within this area, search for 'Email Preferences', 'Notifications', or 'Settings'.

### Step 3: Adjust Your Email Preferences

This is where you take control. You can:
*   Unsubscribe from specific alert types. For instance, keep saved search updates but stop general news.
*   Pause all notifications for a chosen period.
*   Stop all marketing emails completely.

Review these options carefully and select what works best. This is the main answer to **how do I turn off email alerts** exactly as you want.

### Step 4: Save Your Changes

Crucially, always click 'Save', 'Update Preferences', or a similar button. This confirms your new settings. You don't want to go through all that effort for the emails to keep arriving!

## Frequently Asked Questions About Email Alerts

### Q: What if I can't log in to my account to change settings?

A: If account access is an issue, don't worry. Every email from BuyAndScrap.com includes an 'Unsubscribe' link at the very bottom. Clicking this link usually takes you directly to your email preferences page. Alternatively, it might let you unsubscribe from that specific type of email immediately.

### Q: Can I only stop certain types of emails?

A: Yes, absolutely. Once you're in your 'Email Preferences' section, you can often pick and choose. You might want to keep alerts for new [cars](/cars) matching your search criteria but stop general news updates. It's all about what you prefer.

### Q: I'm still getting emails. How do I turn off email alerts completely?

A: If emails persist after 48 hours, double-check your 'Email Preferences' to ensure all options are set correctly and saved. If issues continue, please contact our support team directly. They can help ensure all alerts are stopped for you.
